parameters.query:
WITH org AS (
  INSERT INTO appdata.organizations (name)
  SELECT $6::text
  WHERE $6::text IS NOT NULL
  RETURNING id
), sales_user AS (
  SELECT id FROM appdata.users WHERE role = 'sales' AND active ORDER BY id LIMIT 1
), person AS (
  INSERT INTO appdata.people (organization_id, first_name, last_name, email, phone)
  VALUES ((SELECT id FROM org), $1, $2, $3, $4)
  RETURNING id
), client AS (
  INSERT INTO appdata.clients (type, organization_id, primary_contact_id, owner_user_id, source, contact_form, qualification, inbound_at)
  VALUES ($5::appdata.client_type, (SELECT id FROM org), (SELECT id FROM person), (SELECT id FROM sales_user), $7::appdata.lead_source, $8::appdata.contact_form, 'MQL', now())
  RETURNING id
), opp AS (
  INSERT INTO appdata.opportunities (client_id, stage, label)
  VALUES ((SELECT id FROM client), 'nowa', $9)
  RETURNING id
), task AS (
  INSERT INTO appdata.tasks (entity_type, entity_id, assignee_user_id, title, stage_ref)
  VALUES ('opportunity', (SELECT id FROM opp), (SELECT id FROM sales_user), 'Zweryfikuj leada #' || (SELECT id FROM client), 'nowa')
  RETURNING id
)
SELECT
  (SELECT id FROM client) AS client_id,
  (SELECT id FROM opp)    AS opportunity_id,
  (SELECT id FROM task)   AS task_id;
